mapper.select: select student_no, student_name, concat(left(student_ssn,8),'******'), if(student_address is not null, if(char_length(student_address) > 10, concat(left(student_address,10),'...'),student_address), ' ***주소 미상*** '), date_format(entrance_date,'%Y/%m/%d'), absence_yn from tb_student where student_name like CONCAT('%', #{student_name}, '%')

select student_no, student_name, concat(left(student_ssn,8),'******'), if(student_address is not null, if(char_length(student_address) > 10, concat(left(student_address,10),'...'),student_address), ' ***주소 미상*** '), date_format(entrance_date,'%Y/%m/%d'), absence_yn from tb_student where entrance_date between CONCAT(#{x}, '-01-01') and CONCAT(#{y},'-12-31') order by entrance_date desc
